body:
Example: aggregate SearchImpressionShare, TopImpressionPercentage, AbsoluteTopImpressionPercentage from Google Ads Ad Group Auction Insight Metric by AdGroupId, AccountId at the adgroup.

SQL:
SELECT
    AdGroupId,
    AccountId,
    SUM(SearchImpressionShare) AS SearchImpressionShare,
    SUM(TopImpressionPercentage) AS TopImpressionPercentage,
    SUM(AbsoluteTopImpressionPercentage) AS AbsoluteTopImpressionPercentage
FROM GoogleAdsAdGroupAuctionInsightMetric
WHERE AggregationPeriod = '3Day'
GROUP BY
    AdGroupId,
    AccountId;

Example: aggregate SearchImpressionShare, TopImpressionPercentage, AbsoluteTopImpressionPercentage from Google Ads Campaign Auction Insight Metric by CampaignId, AccountId at the campaign.

SQL:
SELECT
    CampaignId,
    AccountId,
    SUM(SearchImpressionShare) AS SearchImpressionShare,
    SUM(TopImpressionPercentage) AS TopImpressionPercentage,
    SUM(AbsoluteTopImpressionPercentage) AS AbsoluteTopImpressionPercentage
FROM GoogleAdsCampaignAuctionInsightMetric
WHERE AggregationPeriod = '3Day'
GROUP BY
    CampaignId,
    AccountId;

Example: aggregate LastBidPublishValue, LastCalculationSettingChangedValue from Google Ads Ad Group Bid Change by AdGroupId, LastBidPublishCalculationId at the adgroup.

SQL:
SELECT
    AdGroupId,
    LastBidPublishCalculationId,
    SUM(LastBidPublishValue) AS LastBidPublishValue,
    SUM(LastCalculationSettingChangedValue) AS LastCalculationSettingChangedValue
FROM GoogleAdsAdGroupBidChange
GROUP BY
    AdGroupId,
    LastBidPublishCalculationId;

Example: aggregate LastBidPublishValue, LastCalculationSettingChangedValue from Google Ads Campaign Bid Change by CampaignId, LastBidPublishCalculationId at the campaign.

SQL:
SELECT
    CampaignId,
    LastBidPublishCalculationId,
    SUM(LastBidPublishValue) AS LastBidPublishValue,
    SUM(LastCalculationSettingChangedValue) AS LastCalculationSettingChangedValue
FROM GoogleAdsCampaignBidChange
GROUP BY
    CampaignId,
    LastBidPublishCalculationId;

Example: aggregate LastBidPublishValue, LastCalculationSettingChangedValue from Microsoft Ads Ad Group Bid Change by AdGroupId, LastBidPublishCalculationId at the adgroup.

SQL:
SELECT
    AdGroupId,
    LastBidPublishCalculationId,
    SUM(LastBidPublishValue) AS LastBidPublishValue,

Example: aggregate LastBidPublishValue, LastCalculationSettingChangedValue from Microsoft Ads Campaign Bid Change by CampaignId, LastBidPublishCalculationId at the campaign.

SQL:
SELECT
    CampaignId,
    LastBidPublishCalculationId,
    SUM(LastBidPublishValue) AS LastBidPublishValue,
    SUM(LastCalculationSettingChangedValue) AS LastCalculationSettingChangedValue
FROM MicrosoftAdsCampaignBidChange
GROUP BY
    CampaignId,
    LastBidPublishCalculationId;

Example: look up a single Category row by its key and see a few attributes.

SQL:
SELECT
    CategoryId,
    CategoryName,
    EventType,
    ChangedTimestampUtc
FROM Category
WHERE CategoryId = <some_categoryid_value>;

Example: look up a single Event row by its key and see a few attributes.

SQL:
SELECT
    EventId,
    EventName,
    EventStatus,
    EventDateTimeLocal
FROM Event
WHERE EventId = <some_eventid_value>;

Example: aggregate ExchangeOrders, ExchangeQuantity, ExchangeRevenue from All Time Detailed Exchange Metric by EventId at the event.

SQL:
SELECT
    EventId,
    SUM(ExchangeOrders) AS ExchangeOrders,
    SUM(ExchangeQuantity) AS ExchangeQuantity,
    SUM(ExchangeRevenue) AS ExchangeRevenue
FROM AllTimeDetailedExchangeMetric
GROUP BY
    EventId;

Example: aggregate ExchangeOrders, ExchangeQuantity, ExchangeRevenue from All Time Standard Exchange Metric by EventId at the event.

SQL:
SELECT
    EventId,
    SUM(ExchangeOrders) AS ExchangeOrders,
    SUM(ExchangeQuantity) AS ExchangeQuantity,
    SUM(ExchangeRevenue) AS ExchangeRevenue
FROM AllTimeStandardExchangeMetric
GROUP BY
    EventId;

Example: look up a single Funnel Metric row by its key and see a few attributes.

Example: aggregate TrafficSourceIdentifier from Google Ads Funnel Metric Traffic Source by TrafficSourceId, AccountId at the adgroup.

SQL:
SELECT
    TrafficSourceId,
    AccountId,
    SUM(TrafficSourceIdentifier) AS TrafficSourceIdentifier
FROM GoogleAdsFunnelMetricTrafficSource
GROUP BY
    TrafficSourceId,
    AccountId;

Example: aggregate TrafficSourceIdentifier from Microsoft Ads Funnel Metric Traffic Source by TrafficSourceId, AccountId at the adgroup.

SQL:
SELECT
    TrafficSourceId,
    AccountId,
    SUM(TrafficSourceIdentifier) AS TrafficSourceIdentifier
FROM MicrosoftAdsFunnelMetricTrafficSource
GROUP BY
    TrafficSourceId,
    AccountId;

Example: aggregate ListingCount from Event Inventory Metric by EventId at the event.

SQL:
SELECT
    EventId,
    SUM(ListingCount) AS ListingCount
FROM EventInventoryMetric
GROUP BY
    EventId;

Example: look up a single Event Order Metric row by its key and see a few attributes.

Example: look up a single Dim Calendar row by its key and see a few attributes.

SQL:
